userStories.title: Extract user identity from JWT
userStories.description: Implement logic in app.py to parse the Authorization header and extract user_id using the existing jwt_secret_key.
acceptanceCriteria: user_id is available in the request context for all protected routes

userStories.title: Remove hardcoded demo_user
userStories.description: Global search and personal balance retrieval must use the dynamic user_id instead of 'demo_user'.
acceptanceCriteria: All references to 'demo_user' are replaced with context-provided user_id
System still works correctly after refactor

userStories.title: Persistent Usage Tracking
userStories.description: Move daily message counts from in-memory dictionary to Appwrite collection.
acceptanceCriteria: Usage is tracked per valid user_id
